content.en:
"Your invincible body is so powerful!"

The Immortal Fog Ancestor trembled.

He had already been defeated by an invincible robbery just now, and his physical body was almost thirty percent annihilated, and if he continued like this, he would soon fall.

is also a fifth-class invincible, and he has been a fifth-class invincible for a long time, his strength is much stronger than the average fifth-class invincible, and he has also comprehended two invincible skills, but he didn't expect it to be far inferior to Ye Tian.

It can be seen how terrifying and powerful Ye Tian's invincible body robbery is, far beyond his imagination.

Moreover, the invincible skill that Ye Tian used was definitely not an ordinary invincible skill, but a top-notch invincible skill, so the power that could be exerted far exceeded his invincible skill.

If it weren't for Ye Tian being suppressed by the rules of Feathering Heaven and Earth, he could only exert a small part of his strength, otherwise he would have been killed in seconds.

"Escape!" "The Immortal Fog Ancestor is not ready to guard this opportunity, no matter how powerful the opportunity is, but if he falls, then there will be nothing.

However, he simply couldn't escape.

Ye Tian wasn't ready to let him go at all, he didn't have time to break through the barrier of Feathering Heaven and Earth.

Soon, all the vitality of the Immortal Fog Ancestor was annihilated, turning into a corpse and floating on the golden mountain.

And the battle just now did not cause the slightest damage to Jinshan, which is enough to see the magic of this Jinshan.

Killing a fifth-class invincible person like the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor, Ye Tian didn't have the slightest pride.

The Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor is actually very weak, and it seems that he has comprehended two invincible skills, but both the foundation and the invincible body are too fragile to do so, and any fifth-rank invincible person in the Heavenly Wind Sea can beat the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor.

Therefore, it naturally didn't take much effort for him to kill such a fifth-rank invincible.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the palace of the Immortal Fog Ancestor on the Golden Mountain, there was nothing in it, it was just a simple residence.

Subsequently, Ye Tian found a golden scroll from the items on the body of the Immortal Fog Ancestor, and a document was recorded on this golden scroll.

Void Gold Mountain: Ranked one hundred and twenty-eighth in the eternal source of things, every 30,000 eons can give birth to a Void Gold Fruit, which can strengthen the body, condense the soul, and permanently enhance understanding.

"It turned out to be a Void Golden Fruit!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He has not been cultivating all the time in Tianfeng Hai over the years, and he has also learned about various treasures through Tianfeng Hai, including the treasure of the Void Golden Fruit.

However, high-ranking members are not eligible to exchange for Void Gold Fruit, and only elite members are eligible to exchange for Void Gold Fruit.

As far as he knew, a Void Golden Fruit needed a billion contribution points.

If one contribution value of Tianfeng Sea is converted to the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, it is enough to be equivalent to 4,000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, and even more than that.

Because the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal is easy to obtain, but the Origin Rule Tribulation Realm cannot be exchanged for many treasures, while the contribution value of Tianfeng Sea can.

Therefore, what is the concept of a billion contribution value, which is equivalent to trillions of origin rule robbery crystals!

For the Immortal Mist Ancestor and the Blood Mist Alliance, their entire net worth is far less than 100 million Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, which shows how attractive the Void Mi Golden Fruit is to them.

Whether they take it out and trade it, or refine it themselves, it is an unimaginable opportunity.

It's a pity that all this belongs to Ye Tian.

"No wonder the Immortal Departure Fog Ancestor is reluctant to leave, the treasure worth trillions of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, who is willing to give it up, and the Void Mi Golden Fruit is just a treasure born from the Void Mi Gold Mountain, the value of the Void Mi Gold Mountain is even greater, it is simply impossible to calculate, if it were me, it would be impossible to give up here!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The Void Mi Jinshan is the eternal source, and Ye Tian also understands the eternal source, although he doesn't know much, but he knows that the eternal source is even higher than the regular heavenly object at the level.

The rule of heaven is a kind of treasure born in the eternal heaven and earth, representing the rules of the eternal heaven and earth, but the eternal source thing corresponds to the source sea, most of the eternal source things are born in the source sea, once it appears, even the most garbage eternal source will cause a large number of first-class invincible people to fight and snatch.

And once the powerful Eternal Source is born, maybe even the Supreme One will take action.

The eternal source of the Void Gold Mountain, I am afraid that even the Heavenly Wind Sea may not be able to keep it.

"This kind of treasure can't be reported, and I'd better completely seal off the Feather Heaven and Earth, otherwise it won't be good if it leaks like the Immortal Fog Ancestor did today!"

Ye Tian said secretly.

It can be done to completely seal down an exotic world, but it will come at a great cost.

Ye Tian couldn't completely block an exotic world for the time being, so he let his invincible ancestor clone descend on the Feather Heaven and Earth and guard here.

Subsequently, through research, Ye Tian found that the Void Mi Golden Fruit was not far from the day of birth.

"There are still six dark time left, and the Void Golden Fruit will appear!" Ye Tian estimated.

This is the longest time, and it is possible that it will be born in the next second.

After all, it is an eternal source, so there is no way to estimate it accurately.

I have to say that the Immortal Fog Ancestor just had no luck, and when the Void Golden Fruit was about to be born, he fell.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, five dark hours passed.

At this time, Ye Tian made great progress.

With sufficient resources, he raised his cultivation to the limit of a fifth-class invincible, and the invincible body of Wanyuan Guiru was also cultivated by him to the second late stage realm, and he perfected it, which allowed the ontology to be cultivated to the second late stage of Wanyuan Guiru.

However, from the late stage of the second level to the second consummation, I am afraid that it will take a great tribulation time.

this day.

The Void Golden Fruit was born!

Airplanes!!!!

On the Void Gold Mountain, an illusory golden fruit appeared.

Just like the Void Golden Mountain, the Divine Sense and other means cannot be snooped on, and the Void Golden Fruit can only be seen with the eyes.

As time passed, the Void Mi Golden Fruit absorbed the power of the Void Mi Golden Mountain and slowly became condensed.

Hundreds of millions of years have passed, and this Void Gold Fruit has really matured.

Immediately, Ye Tian picked this Void Golden Fruit.

Now, Ye Tian has two choices, the first choice is to hand over the Void Mi Golden Fruit to Tianfeng Hai, at least he can get 100,000 contribution points.

However, if he does this, the Void Gold Mountain will not be able to hide it.

Moreover, he is not short of contribution points now, and with his ability, it is not difficult to earn contribution points at all.

Therefore, he will not choose this method.

"Let's just eat it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he brought this Void Gold Fruit back to the Dark Forbidden Realm and let the body swallow it in one gulp.
